MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-30-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO THE SEP-30-2025 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT ASHFORD TRS SF LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRO HAC VICE ADMISSION OF WILLIAM UNDERWOOD IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING, WITH A COVER LETTER DEMONSTRATING COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters: PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE STATUS FOR ATTORNEY WILLIAM E. UNDERWOOD

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Set For Trial On Oct-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT ASHFORD TRS SF LLC's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission of William Underwood is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling, with a cover letter demonstrating compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

payments.description: APPLICATION TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
